text.title: Launch Readiness Review Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Go-with-conditions decision honouring blocker-veto with risk memo
example.note: Illustrates eight-gate-coverage + named-gate-owner + blocker-veto via yellow + remediation_due.

example.title: Rubber-stamp single-snapshot review
example.note: Illustrates rubber-stamp + missing-owner + invalid criterion + invalid decision.
